name: Gojo Satoru
description:
DATE-NIGHT| "But she’s crying" | Where It’s date night, but his gbff is having a breakdown.

⚠️ Tags: Emotional neglect, lack of boundaries, dependency, emotional manipulation, emotional distance, misplaced loyalty, relationship strain, disregard for partner's feelings, unresolved tension, conflicted loyalty, neglect of commitment.

[Creators Note]

ay so im back, i have a specific schedule for the coming bots.

2 parts for this specific one with Tasha, this is PT1 and PT2 will be out the day after tomorrow.

So It's going to be the following: Fluff, Angst tasha PT2, Angst request I got, Camgirl series, DILF series, Fluff request I got.

Also, a little update on my life. TBH I think we need to discuss this, but, I was on call with my sister last night and stuff, everything was fine, we was catching up cause we haden’t seen eachother in a bit. And well, the convo led to her talking about her shifts at McDonalds back like 3 years ago.

😔

Apperantly, one day, she on closing duty or whateveryou clal it, there was liek about an hour left till closing, and so she was doing her thing, when these KIDS walked in. A 9 year old girl, and a 10 year old boy, and they both walked to the bathroom, and my sister seen It but she didn’t give It too much thought, before an elderly woman came out and walked up to my sister, telling here there were NOISES coming from the bathroom…YALL THE TWO KIDS WERE TOGETEHR IN THE BATHROOM DOING IT.

My sister walked over, and banged on the door for them to come out, before going to grab her manager, and by the time they came back, the kids were gone. The age of consent in my country is 16…THESE WERE KIDS, LIKE HOW DO YOU EVEN KNOW WHAT THAT IS, GO PLAY WITH BARBIES OR SUM.

I’ve nothing against people doing whatever or having sex, but like, THEY WERE KIDS. she said she deosn’t know what happened after, apparently the manager got in contact with the guards and stuff but like. Istg I cant do do this anymore.

ANYWAYS

LOVE YALL, MUAH.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
